vineyards.name: Schloss Johannisberg
vineyards.owner: Furst von Metternich Winneburg'sche Domane GbR (Oetker Group)
vineyards.tasting_program: Wine tastings, cellar tours and group programmes by appointment; restaurant and Vinothek on the hillside above Johannisberg.
vineyards.description: Hilltop Schloss Johannisberg above Geisenheim documents a 1720 Riesling replanting and a 1775 Spatlese courier story; 51.5 ha of Riesling-only quartzite.

vineyards.name: Hessische Staatsweinguter Kloster Eberbach
vineyards.address: Kloster Eberbach, 65346 Eltville am Rhein, Germany
vineyards.tasting_program: Daily monastery and winery tours from 10:00, Vinothek and tasting flights at the abbey; seasonal cellar concerts at Kloster Eberbach.
vineyards.description: Hessian state wine estate at the 1136 Cistercian abbey of Eberbach, working 168 ha across the Rheingau with the walled Steinberg monopole and Assmannshausen.

vineyards.name: Schloss Vollrads
vineyards.tasting_program: Vinothek Monday to Sunday 10:00 to 18:00, Hofausschank wine-tavern Saturday-Sunday and holidays 12:00 to 18:00, group tastings for 12+ by appointment.
vineyards.description: An 800-year-old Riesling-only estate above Winkel, with Greiffenclau wine sales to the Mainz St. Viktorstift from 1211; 68 ha planted entirely to Riesling.

vineyards.name: Weingut Robert Weil
vineyards.tasting_program: Tasting room open Mon-Fri 08:00 to 17:30, Sat 10:00 to 17:00, Sun 11:00 to 17:00; private tastings and Gräfenberg vineyard walks by appointment.
vineyards.description: An 1875-founded Kiedrich Riesling estate run by Wilhelm Weil with Suntory as majority partner from 1988; 78 ha all Riesling, flagship Kiedricher Graefenberg.

vineyards.name: Weingut Kunstler
vineyards.tasting_program: Vinothek open by appointment; estate tastings highlight Hochheimer Holle, Domdechaney, Kirchenstuck and Stielweg dry GG bottlings.
vineyards.description: Gunter Kunstler's Hochheim estate, family-owned since 1648 and VDP member since 1994, working 68 ha across Hochheimer Holle, Domdechaney, Kirchenstuck and Stielweg.

vineyards.name: Weingut Leitz
vineyards.tasting_program: Tasting room and sales Mon-Fri 08:00 to 12:00 and 13:00 to 17:00; by appointment for groups; Eins-Zwei-Zero alcohol-free line also poured.
vineyards.description: Johannes Leitz's Rudesheim estate, 111 ha of mostly Riesling across Berg Schlossberg, Berg Rottland, Berg Roseneck and Berg Kaisersteinfels.

vineyards.name: Weingut Georg Breuer
vineyards.tasting_program: Vinothek at Grabenstrasse 8 with cellar tastings by appointment; vineyard walks on the Rudesheimer Berg available in season.
vineyards.description: Theresa Breuer's Rudesheim estate, 40 ha across Rudesheimer Berg, the Rauenthaler Nonnenberg monopole and Lorcher Pfaffenwies; left the VDP in 2000 over GG.

vineyards.name: Weingut Peter Jakob Kuhn
vineyards.tasting_program: Demeter-certified estate offering tastings by appointment at the Muhlstrasse vinothek; spontaneous fermentations and natural-cellar approach explained at visits.
vineyards.description: Demeter-certified Oestrich-Winkel estate working 22.9 ha biodynamically across Schonhell, Lenchen, Jungfer, Sankt Nikolaus and Doosberg; biodynamic reference.

vineyards.name: Weingut Josef Spreitzer
vineyards.tasting_program: Family-run estate with tastings in a 1743 vaulted cellar; visits by appointment, with focus on Oestricher Lenchen, Doosberg and Hattenheimer Wisselbrunnen.
vineyards.description: Brothers Andreas and Bernd Spreitzer's 35 ha estate in Oestrich-Winkel, working 97% Riesling across Lenchen, Doosberg, Wisselbrunnen and the Rosengarten parcel.

vineyards.name: Weingut Eva Fricke
vineyards.tasting_program: Vinothek and tastings by appointment Mon-Thu 12:00 to 17:00 and Fri 12:00 to 15:00; Lorch vineyard walks on the Schlossberg by request.
vineyards.description: Eva Fricke's 2006-founded Riesling estate, based in Eltville with steep Lorch parcels (Schlossberg, Krone, Pfaffenwies); EU-organic and Vegan Society certified.

vineyards.name: Weingut J.B. Becker
vineyards.tasting_program: Traditional family Vinothek at Rheinstrasse 6 with cellar tastings by appointment; Walkenberg and Wallufer Berg Bildstock dry Riesling and Spatburgunder.
vineyards.description: An 1893-founded Walluf family estate run by Hans-Josef and Maria Becker, working the Walkenberg with old-school dry Riesling and ungrafted Spatburgunder.

vineyards.name: Domdechant Werner'sches Weingut
vineyards.tasting_program: Estate tastings by appointment at the Rathausstrasse manor; specialised in Hochheim VDP.Grosse Lage sites including Domdechaney and Holle.
vineyards.description: Hochheim family estate held by the Michel-Werner line since the late 18th century, 13.5 ha of mostly Riesling on chalky loess in Domdechaney and Kirchenstuck.

vineyards.name: Weingut Joachim Flick
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings and sales Mon-Fri 15:00 to 19:00 and Sat 10:00 to 14:00 at the Strassenmuhle estate; visits to the Hochheimer Konigin Victoriaberg monopole by appointment.
vineyards.description: Florsheim-Wicker family estate, 20 ha and 81% Riesling, with monopole sites Wickerer Nonnberg and Hochheimer Konigin Victoriaberg (British royal supplier 1850).

vineyards.name: Weingut Krone Assmannshausen
vineyards.owner: Ralf Frenzel (spokesperson for the owning families)
vineyards.tasting_program: Estate tastings and cellar visits by appointment in Assmannshausen; Assmannshauser Hollenberg Spatburgunder is the focal point.
vineyards.description: Pinot-Noir-only Assmannshausen estate working 3.4 ha on the red phyllite-slate Hollenberg; sister property to Hotel Krone and a VDP member since 2017.

vineyards.name: Weingut August Kesseler
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits and tastings by appointment; tours include the 1792 rock-cut double-level cellar in Assmannshausen and the Hollenberg vineyard.
vineyards.description: August Kesseler's Assmannshausen estate, 42 ha split 60% Riesling and 40% Pinot Noir on the Hollenberg and Rudesheimer Berg sites, with a 1792 rock-cut cellar.

vineyards.name: Weingut Chat Sauvage
vineyards.tasting_program: Open for tastings Thursday to Sunday 12:00 to 17:00 at Hohlweg 23; visits cover the Johannisberg Holle and Assmannshausen Hollenberg Pinot Noir parcels.
vineyards.description: A Burgundian-styled Rheingau estate in Johannisberg making Pinot Noir and Chardonnay only, 75% Pinot Noir and 25% Chardonnay; whole-cluster fermentation cellar.

vineyards.name: Domanenweingut Schloss Schonborn
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings and tours of the Schonborn cellars by appointment; the family has owned the estate since 1349.
vineyards.description: A 1349-founded Hattenheim family domain, 50 ha across Pfaffenberg, Marcobrunn and Rauenthaler Baiken; held by the Schonborn family 27 generations.

vineyards.name: Weingut Balthasar Ress
vineyards.tasting_program: Vinothek and restaurant on the Rheinallee waterfront; daily tastings, art exhibitions and harvest events.
vineyards.description: EU-organic Hattenheim estate run by Stefan and Christian Ress; 42.5 ha mostly Riesling across VDP.Grosse Lage and Erste Lage sites with a Rheinallee Vinothek.

vineyards.name: Weingut Kaufmann (formerly Hans Lang)
vineyards.tasting_program: Demeter-biodynamic estate with tastings by appointment at the Rheinallee winery in Hattenheim; visits cover Hassel, Wisselbrunnen and Schonhell.
vineyards.description: Demeter-certified Hattenheim estate run by Swiss owners Urban and Eva Kaufmann since 2013 (formerly Weingut Hans Lang); 17 ha biodynamic Hassel and Wisselbrunnen.

vineyards.name: Weingut Georg Muller Stiftung
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings paired with contemporary art exhibitions in the historic cellar; group visits by appointment.
vineyards.description: An 1882-founded Hattenheim foundation estate of 21 ha working 80% Riesling and 15% Pinot family; cellars double as a contemporary art venue with exhibitions.

vineyards.name: Weingut Barth Wein- und Sektgut
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings by appointment at the Bergweg estate; Lagen-Sekt traditional-method sparkling is the speciality alongside dry Riesling.
vineyards.description: Mark and Christine Barth's 23 ha Hattenheim estate, EU-organic and focused on traditional-method Lagen-Sekt from Hassel and Wisselbrunnen.

vineyards.name: Weingut Prinz
vineyards.tasting_program: EU-organic, biodynamic-practising estate; tastings by appointment in Hallgarten, focused on Jungfer, Schonhell and Hendelberg.
vineyards.description: Fred and Florian Prinz's 12.6 ha Hallgarten estate, EU-organic and biodynamic-practising, working Jungfer, Schonhell and Hendelberg on the elevated Hallgarten slopes (around 270 metres).

vineyards.name: Weingut Prinz von Hessen
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings and group tours by appointment at the Grund estate; year-round Vinothek hours posted on the producer site.
vineyards.description: The Hesse family estate at Grund 1 in Johannisberg, 36 ha and 92% Riesling under chairman Donatus Landgraf von Hessen; VDP member since 1969.

vineyards.name: Weingut Johannishof Eser
vineyards.tasting_program: Tenth-generation family estate offering tastings by appointment at the Johannisberg cellar; specialised in Berg Rottland and Holle Riesling.
vineyards.description: Tenth-generation Eser family estate in Johannisberg, 14.1 ha of 99% Riesling working Berg Rottland, Klaus and Johannisberger Holle; VDP member since 1994.

vineyards.name: Weingut Geheimrat J. Wegeler Rheingau
vineyards.tasting_program: Gutshaus tastings, Vinothek and wine garden at Friedensplatz; visits by appointment; the family also runs estates on the Mosel.
vineyards.description: Wegeler-Drieseberg family estate at Friedensplatz in Oestrich, 41.7 ha all Riesling working Berg Schlossberg, Lenchen, Doosberg and Geisenheimer Rothenberg.

vineyards.name: Weingut Familie Allendorf
vineyards.tasting_program: Allendorf Weinforum tastings and restaurant in Oestrich-Winkel; flights, vineyard tours and seasonal events.
vineyards.description: Long-established Oestrich-Winkel family estate (cited to 1292) of 65.6 ha across the Rheingau; in conversion to organic with the Allendorf Weinforum tasting hub.

vineyards.name: Weingut Querbach
vineyards.tasting_program: Family Vinothek and tastings by appointment in Oestrich; visits cover Doosberg, Lenchen, Schonhell and Hasensprung.
vineyards.description: Peter Querbach's 10 ha Oestrich estate across Doosberg, Lenchen, Schonhell and Hasensprung; spontaneous ferments and long lees ageing.

vineyards.name: Weingut August Eser
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings by appointment in the 350-year-old vaulted cellar at Friedensplatz 19; estate wines mature in classical oak Stuckfass.
vineyards.description: Desiree Eser's 12.2 ha Oestrich estate, 90% Riesling and 10% Spatburgunder, with traditional Stuckfass ageing in a 350-year-old vaulted cellar at Friedensplatz.

vineyards.name: Schloss Reinhartshausen
vineyards.tasting_program: Riverside Erbach estate with Vinothek, Schlossgarten and tasting events; tours include the historic 1801 castle and Marcobrunn parcels.
vineyards.description: Private Erbach domain on the Rhine documented from 1337 and EU-organic certified from 2021; about 80 ha across Erbach, Hattenheim and Kiedrich incl. Marcobrunn.

vineyards.name: Weingut Baron Knyphausen
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings, the 1818 estate restaurant, the 1141 wine bar and the Draiser Hof hotel on a Cistercian farmstead once owned by Kloster Eberbach.
vineyards.description: EU-organic Erbach estate on a former Eberbach monastery farmstead, owned by the Knyphausen family for over 200 years; 16.7 ha with a parcel of Erbacher Marcobrunn.

vineyards.name: Weingut Jakob Jung
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings by appointment at the Eberbacher Strasse estate; VDP.Grosse Lage focus on Erbacher Hohenrain and Siegelsberg.
vineyards.description: Alexander Jung's 20 ha Erbach family estate, 80% Riesling with Spatburgunder, Pinot Blanc, Chardonnay, Sauvignon and Merlot; VDP member since 1997.

vineyards.name: Weingut Achim von Oetinger
vineyards.winemaker: Achim von Oetinger and Lutz Loosen
vineyards.tasting_program: Vinothek open Mon and Fri from 16:00, weekends and holidays from noon; the Marcobrunn and Siegelsberg parcels are the headline tastings.
vineyards.description: Achim von Oetinger's restored Erbach estate (relaunched 2008), 12.3 ha and 85% Riesling across Marcobrunn and Siegelsberg VDP.Grosse Lage parcels.

vineyards.name: Weingut Diefenhardt
vineyards.tasting_program: Fifth-generation family estate with tastings by appointment in a 17th-century barrel cellar in Martinsthal.
vineyards.description: An Eltville-Martinsthal family estate of 18.8 ha (82% Riesling, 18% Spatburgunder) run by the fifth-generation Seyffardts in a 17th-century barrel cellar.

vineyards.name: Weingut Freimuth
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings by appointment at the Marienthal hamlet above Geisenheim; whole-bunch fermentations and lengthy lees ageing.
vineyards.description: Jonas Freimuth's 12.1 ha Geisenheim-Marienthal estate, 65% Riesling and 35% Pinot family; three VDP.Grosse Lage sites in the Rheingau and whole-bunch fermentation.

vineyards.name: Weingut Graf von Kanitz
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings inside the 14th-century tower cellar at Rheinstrasse 49 in Lorch; group programmes and Lorcher Schlossberg vineyard walks by appointment.
vineyards.description: A Lorch family domain documented from the 13th century, 14.5 ha on grey slate and quartzite; 70% Riesling, 28% Burgundy family, and tastings in a 14th-century tower.

vineyards.name: Weingut Mohr
vineyards.owner: Neher family (Jochen Neher and Saynur Sonkaya-Neher)
vineyards.tasting_program: ECOVIN-organic estate offering tastings, cooking classes and a casual Strausswirtschaft at Rheinstrasse 21 in Lorch.
vineyards.description: ECOVIN-organic Lorch estate of 6 ha across Lorcher Schlossberg, Krone, Pfaffenwies and Bodental-Steinberg plus an Assmannshausen Hollenberg parcel.

vineyards.name: Weingut Bibo Runge
vineyards.owner: Revoluzzer Wein GmbH (Pascal Bibo and Christian Runge)
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings and Vinothek visits by appointment at Eberbacher Strasse 5 in Oestrich-Winkel; skin-contact, basket-pressed Rieslings and Pinot Noir.
vineyards.description: A 2013-founded Oestrich-Winkel estate by Pascal Bibo and Christian Runge, working Hallgartener Jungfer and Schonhell with skin-contact Rieslings and basket Pinot.

vineyards.name: Weingut Trenz
vineyards.tasting_program: Family Vinothek and tastings at the Johannisberg estate; visits cover the Taunus quartzite parcels and the Frisian island offshoot.
vineyards.description: A Johannisberg family estate documented from 1670, 15 ha on Taunus quartzite around Johannisberg; named Discovery of the Year by Gault Millau in 2008.

vineyards.name: Wein- und Sektgut F.B. Schonleber
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings by appointment in Oestrich-Winkel; speciality in single-vineyard traditional-method Sekt with extended bottle ageing.
vineyards.description: Bernd and Ralf Schonleber's 11.7 ha Oestrich-Winkel estate, 94% Riesling; about 22,000 bottles a year of traditional-method Lagen-Sekt alongside still wines.

vineyards.name: Weingut Hamm
vineyards.tasting_program: EU-organic family estate with a Gutsausschank wine-tavern in Oestrich; tastings paired with seasonal Rheingau dishes.
vineyards.description: Hamm family Oestrich-Winkel estate of 6 ha, EU-organic and over 90% Riesling, with a Gutsausschank wine-tavern at Hauptstrasse 60.

vineyards.name: Weingut Koegler
vineyards.tasting_program: Family Vinothek and Hof Bechtermunz Weinhotel in Eltville town centre with tastings and Strausswirtschaft.
vineyards.description: A four-generation Koegler family estate in Eltville town centre with the Hof Bechtermunz Weinhotel; 34 ha of mostly Riesling on Sonnenberg and Langenstuck.

vineyards.name: Weingut Robert Konig
vineyards.tasting_program: Family Pinot specialist with tastings and a Strausswirtschaft at Landhaus Kenner above Assmannshausen; Hollenberg, Frankenthal and Drachenstein parcels.
vineyards.description: Philipp Konig's thirteen-generation Assmannshausen Pinot specialist; 90% red varieties on Hollenberg, Frankenthal and Drachenstein, plus Riesling and Pinot Blanc.

vineyards.name: Weingut Friedrich Altenkirch
vineyards.address: Binger Weg 2, 65391 Lorch am Rhein, Germany
vineyards.tasting_program: Lorch family estate at Binger Weg 2 with tastings, a restaurant and vacation apartments; restaurant open Thursday to Sunday.
vineyards.description: An 1826-founded Lorch family estate of about 12 ha on grey-slate Lorch slopes; tastings, restaurant and apartments inside the UNESCO Upper Middle Rhine valley.

vineyards.name: Weingut Magdalenenhof
vineyards.address: Marienthaler Strasse 90, 65385 Rudesheim am Rhein, Germany
vineyards.tasting_program: Year-round Magdalenenhof Strausswirtschaft with sun terrace, winter garden and rooms in the former pressing house; only estate wines poured.
vineyards.description: Blaes family Rudesheim Strausswirtschaft and winery on the road to Marienthal; vineyards in Magdalenenkreuz, Kirchenpfad and Rottland with Riesling and Pinot Noir.

vineyards.name: Weingut Dr. Heinrich Nagler
vineyards.tasting_program: Rudesheim town-centre Vinothek with tastings of dry and noble-sweet Riesling from Berg Schlossberg, Berg Roseneck and Berg Rottland; visits by appointment.
vineyards.description: A six-generation Rudesheim family estate documented from 1826; 90% Riesling across Berg Schlossberg, Berg Roseneck and Berg Rottland on the Rudesheimer Berg.

vineyards.name: Weingut Schumann-Nagler
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings and sales at the historic Nothgottesstrasse cellar in Geisenheim; visits cover Geisenheim, Winkel, Oestrich, Kiedrich and Hattenheim parcels.
vineyards.description: A Geisenheim family estate documented to 1438 and now in the 25th generation; 40 ha and 90% Riesling across Geisenheim, Winkel, Oestrich and Kiedrich sites.

vineyards.name: Weingut Friesenhahn
vineyards.tasting_program: Family-run Aulhausen estate above Rudesheim; tastings, Strausswirtschaft and direct sales by appointment in the village cellar.
vineyards.description: A small Aulhausen family estate above Rudesheim of about 6.5 ha, working steep Rudesheimer Berg parcels for Riesling, Grauburgunder and a small Spatburgunder line.

vineyards.name: Weingut Sohns
vineyards.tasting_program: Fourth-generation family estate in northern Geisenheim with tastings, Strausswirtschaft and direct sales; organic guidelines and steep-slope Lorch parcels.
vineyards.description: Denise and Pascal Sohns's fourth-generation Geisenheim estate of 10 ha under organic guidelines; flagship Riesling from Klauserweg and Lorchhauser Seligmacher.

vineyards.name: Weingut Paul Laquai
vineyards.address: Gewerbepark Wispertal 2, 65391 Lorch am Rhein, Germany
vineyards.tasting_program: Lorch Weinwirtschaft in a half-timbered house in the village centre with regional home-cooked food paired with estate wines; tastings and direct sales.
vineyards.description: A Lorch family estate working steep grey-slate slopes for Riesling-led dry whites and Pinot Noir; Weinwirtschaft Laquai in the half-timbered village centre.

vineyards.name: Weingut Lorenz Kunz
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings by appointment at the Rheingaustrasse cellar in Oestrich-Winkel; focus on natural ferments and lees-aged Riesling.
vineyards.description: A long-running Oestrich-Winkel family estate in family ownership since 1710; about 12 ha of Riesling-led, spontaneously fermented, lees-aged wines.

vineyards.name: Weingut Prasser
vineyards.tasting_program: Rudesheim family Gutsausschank with tastings, themed Gruselweinprobe events, accommodation and direct sales.
vineyards.description: Rudesheim family estate with Riesling, Winzersekt and Spatburgunder across the Pradikat scale to Eiswein; tastings and wine events at the Christophelstrasse cellar.

vineyards.name: Weingut Dr. Corvers-Kauter
vineyards.tasting_program: Gutsausschank tasting garden in Mittelheim with regional cuisine, plus group tastings by appointment.
vineyards.description: Corvers-Kauter Oestrich-Winkel estate (Mittelheim) merged from two predecessors in 1996; 13 ha of Riesling and Spatburgunder with a Gutsausschank tasting garden.

vineyards.name: Weingut Heinz Nikolai
vineyards.tasting_program: Fifth- and sixth-generation Erbach family estate with tastings, direct sales and a Strausswirtschaft; Erbacher Siegelsberg and Steinmorgen the focus.
vineyards.description: An Erbach family estate operating in the Rheingau since 1824, now fifth and sixth generation; 16 ha across Siegelsberg, Steinmorgen and Hallgartener Jungfer.

vineyards.name: Bischofliches Weingut Rudesheim
vineyards.tasting_program: Diocesan Rudesheim cellar at the former Saint Hildegard monastery in Eibingen with tastings and direct sales; revenue supports the Limburg diocese.
vineyards.description: Diocese of Limburg Rudesheim-Eibingen estate, 9 ha at the former Saint Hildegard monastery; 80% Riesling and 20% Pinot Noir, cellar master Peter Perabo from 2007.

vineyards.name: Weingut Josef Schonleber
vineyards.tasting_program: Family Vinothek and Strausswirtschaft on the Marktstrasse in Oestrich-Winkel; tastings by appointment, Geisenheim-educated winemaker.
vineyards.description: A Schonleber family Oestrich-Winkel estate working 90% Riesling across Oestrich, Mittelheim, Winkel and Hallgarten; Michael Schonleber trained at Geisenheim.

vineyards.name: Weingut Crass
vineyards.tasting_program: Burg Crass estate restaurant and Gutsausschank in the historic Erbach buildings; tastings, gardens and barrier-free Vinothek.
vineyards.description: Matthias Crass's family Erbach estate, working Steinmorgen, Hohenrain, Michelmark and Kiedricher Sandgrub; runs a restaurant in the historic Burg Crass since 2016.

vineyards.name: Weingut Karl-Johann Molitor
vineyards.tasting_program: Hattenheim family estate with cellar tastings, vineyard walks and direct sales; Klaus Molitor has run the estate since 1999.
vineyards.description: A Molitor family Hattenheim estate (Klaus took over from his father Karl in 1999); Riesling, Spatburgunder, Chardonnay and Grauburgunder across the Rheingau.

vineyards.name: Weingut H.J. Ernst
vineyards.tasting_program: Fourth-generation Eltville family estate with Vinothek, Kernstuck cuvee tastings and a JoSecco Perlwein line.
vineyards.description: An Eltville Ernst family estate of around 40 ha, fourth generation under Johannes and Katrin Ernst; Riesling, Spatburgunder, traditional Sekt and JoSecco Perlwein.

vineyards.name: Weingut Engelmann
vineyards.address: Im Taubenberg, 65344 Eltville am Rhein, Germany
vineyards.tasting_program: Gutsausschank Im Taubenberg in the vineyards above Eltville with terrace, regional food and tastings; visits by appointment otherwise.
vineyards.description: An Engelmann family Eltville estate of about 11 ha; dry Riesling and a Gutsausschank wine-tavern Im Taubenberg with terrace views over the vineyards.

vineyards.name: Weingut Egert
vineyards.tasting_program: Sixth-generation Hattenheim family estate with a Rheinallee Vinothek and tastings across parcels from Erbach through Hattenheim to Mittelheim.
vineyards.description: A sixth-generation Hattenheim family estate of 9 ha along the Rhine from Erbach through Hattenheim, Oestrich and Mittelheim; Riesling and Burgundy varieties.

vineyards.name: Weingut Ernst Russler
vineyards.tasting_program: Rauenthal family Gutsschanke with seasonal regional cuisine and tastings; vineyard walks on Baiken and Gehrn by appointment.
vineyards.description: A nearly-300-year Rauenthal family estate of about 13 ha on Taunus phyllite; dry Riesling from Baiken and Gehrn with a longstanding Gutsschanke for regional cuisine.

verified.address_quoted: Vor dem Kaltenborn 3, 65345 Rauenthal im Rheingau
